title: Expand language-meta interop tree and repair Astro site build

source.subject: Fix site build and document corelib workspace publishing.

body:
## Outcome

Fix site build and document corelib workspace publishing.

## Context

- Workstream **platform-spec** — normative spec on beskid-lang.org.
- LSP work shares the typed HIR spine with analyze/build; workspace templates feed the project graph pipeline.
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c38a8e9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c38a8e9) — Fix site build and document corelib workspace publishing.
